column1: The President of the Confederate States of America was Robert E Lee
Archduke Franz Ferdinand was assassinated in Croatia
The Battle of Kursk was the largest tank battle in history
Neville Chamberlain was Prime Minister at the start of the First World War
Operation Overlord was the codename for D-Day
Prior to founding the British Union of Fascists Oswald Mosley was in the Labour Conservative and Liberal parties
Benito Mussolini was a prominent Socialist prior to founding the National Fascist Party
The Soviet T-34 tank used sloped armour
The M4 Sherman is a British tank
The Italian Social Republic was based in Salo
The Berlin Blockade began after the Korean War
The Warsaw Pact was formed during Stalin's rule of the Soviet Union
The Soviet Union had 16 constituent republics when it dissolved in 1991
Out of the 8 leaders of the USSR (Lenin-Gorbachev) only two were born outside Russia (modern borders)
Jan Hus was a proto-Protestant who was born in Bohemia (modern Czechia)
The tomato originally comes from Italy
Roman Emperor Diocletian was the first to divide the Empire into east and west
The city of Istanbul was once known as Byzantion
The Act of Union between Great Britain and Ireland was passed in 1707
Courland is a historical region located in modern day Latvia
